insight: EssentialsDiscord only relays chat when the event's recipients include all online players; ChatControl channels clear recipients, so chat needs show-all-chat: true in EssentialsDiscord's config.yml to reach Discord. To then exclude a specific channel (e.g. admin chat) from Discord, set Cancel_Event: true on that channel, since EssentialsDiscord's Bukkit and Paper chat listeners both skip cancelled events.
